case_title: BALDIZON ANA et al VS CEBALLOS ROSA MARIA et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALDIZON ANA BALDIZON FERNANDO A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CEBALLOS ROSA MARIA DIAZ MIGUEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,322.00 FILED BY BALDIZON ANA BALDIZON FERNANDO A. AS TO DEFENDANT CEBALLOS ROSA MARIA DIAZ MIGUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
